data.title: Integrate Gate 2d into fix-bug SKILL.md
data.description:
Add Gate 2d (dependency check) section to plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md in the post-investigation workflow (after fix is proposed, before commit).

The section:
- Runs gate-2d-dependency-check.sh with affected file paths and --repo-root
- Parses gate signal JSON from stdout
- If triggered:true -> adds a primary signal to the gate accumulator
- Error handling: nonzero exit, empty stdout, or JSON parse failure -> treat as triggered:false, log warning
- Documents that reusing existing codebase patterns does not trigger
- References gate-signal-schema.md contract

Note: Done Definition 3 mentions "novel architectural pattern" but user clarification narrowed Gate 2d scope to dependency detection in package manifests only. Broad structural pattern detection is out of scope.

TDD: GREEN — implement until Task 6 tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2d.py -q
- [ ] SKILL.md contains Gate 2d section
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 2d' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] References dependency check script
  Verify: grep -q 'gate-2d-dependency-check' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
